title: Outdoor Dining Bundle with Madison Cross Back Chairs
features: Move your dining room to the fresh air with our Outdoor Dining Bundle featuring 24 of our Madison Cross Back Chair - Mark II.

Whether you live where it's summer all the time or you only get to cherish 5 months of sunshine bliss, this package is the one stop shop to turn your restaurant, bistro, cafe, pub or winery into an outside oasis.

Both of our 48'' Round Titan Series Wood Folding Table and our 48'' x 48'' Square Titan Series Wood Folding Table will comfortable seat 4-6 guests with room to spare so you can sit comfortably and still maintain 6 feet from your fellow diners.
If you really want to take your dining performance up a notch, Choose our 48'' Round TitanPRO™ Heavy Duty Wood Folding Table with metal edge, our most durable line of wooden banquet folding tables.
With warmer months comes unpredictable weather.
So you're always prepared for rain or a little too much shine, our UV resistant 20' x 20' Cross Cable Tent is included to take of that and more.
Sidewalls for the tent are also option if you so choose.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping, Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k
